model_vs_market.interpretation: Negative delta_brier_vs_devig OR delta_logloss_vs_devig ⇒ model beats the de-vigged market on that metric.

discrimination.interpretation: AUC ≈ 0.50 ⇒ no discrimination; higher = better ordering. Sharpness too high vs market ⇒ overconfident; too low ⇒ flat.

clv.interpretation: clv_pp_mean < 0 (or clv_log_odds_mean > 0) ⇒ model side beat the closing line on average.
